name: spec-driven-qa
description: Validates code quality through spec-driven QA validation with structural anti-skip enforcement. Replicates all 6 phases of the DevForgeAI QA workflow using the Execute-Verify-Gate pattern at every step. Designed to prevent token optimization bias through lean orchestration, fresh-context subagent delegation, and binary CLI gate enforcement. Enforces test coverage (95%/85%/80% strict thresholds), detects anti-patterns, validates spec compliance, and analyzes code quality metrics. Use when validating implementations, ensuring quality standards, or preparing for release. Always use this skill when the user runs /qa or mentions QA validation, quality checks, or coverage analysis.
